prompt: Start from @이미지1. Hold the framing completely static for the full 4 seconds. Subtle atmospheric mist drifts slowly across the lawn (left to right, very slow). Two of the clubhouse windows turn on their warm tungsten lights at different moments: first window lights up at 1.5s (subtle but visible), second window at 2.3s. The sky transitions almost imperceptibly toward slightly brighter blue. Distant birdsong is heard intermittently. A very soft wind moves the trees only slightly. No camera movement, no zoom.
negative: camera movement, zoom, multiple lights turning on simultaneously, harsh changes in sky color, people appearing
audio_plan: distant birdsong (2-3x), very soft wind, complete silence otherwise, NO BGM yet
notes: v0.6: Seedance 4초 생성 후 편집에서 마지막 1초 트림. 처음 3초 사용. Opening atmosphere - NO BGM.

notes: v0.6: Seedance 4초 생성 → 편집에서 처음 1.33초만 추출. ECU triple 1.

source_bindings.@이미지1: BF30-S5 first frame (CHAR-A walking on misty fairway, golden hour)

prompt: Start from @이미지1. Very slow push-in over 6 seconds (3% of frame width per second), camera at low angle slightly tilted up, never catching up to the figure. The man walks at unhurried, contemplative pace, with 5-6 step cycles visible at exactly 1-second intervals. Wind moves the foreground grass gently throughout. Mist drifts more visibly across middle ground around 3s. The long cast shadow extends and slightly shifts position as the figure walks. Golden hour light intensifies very subtly through the 6 seconds. Sound: diegetic footsteps on grass at exactly 1-second intervals (5x), soft wind sustained, single piano note continuing from previous clip (-22dB), cello enters at 3s (-18dB) and sustains for the remainder.
negative: second person appearing, golf clubs, identifiable golf course features like signature holes or signage, camera shake, faster pacing, sun moving visibly
audio_plan: diegetic footsteps (5x at 1s intervals) + sustained soft wind + piano sustained + cello fade in at 3s and sustain
notes: v0.6: 6초 단일 클립 (트림 불필요). Hero shot. Manual real-person likeness check + Callaway 'At Last' 차별성 검증 필수.

guardrail_check.training_data_concern: golden hour outdoor — moderate. Verify no specific film scene resemblance especially to Callaway At Last
guardrail_check.mitigation: 검수자 시각 확인 + Google Lens 역이미지 검색

source_bindings.@이미지1: BF30-S6 first frame (two figures on walking path)

prompt: Start from @이미지1. Hold framing completely static for the full 5 seconds. The two men remain in three-quarter profile facing each other. CHAR-A (left) makes a small natural gesture with his right hand at 1.5s (palm-up open gesture, brief, contained). The companion (right) responds with a very subtle nod at 2.5s. At 3s, the companion gives a single soft natural laugh (head moves slightly, no exaggeration). Both then settle back into composed listening posture. Light wind moves their hair and the surrounding foliage gently throughout. Cast shadows from the trees overhead subtly play across their shoulders. No camera movement at all. Sound: ambient outdoor + light wind in grass + one single subtle natural laugh at 3s + cello sustained from previous shot + soft piano underneath.
negative: broad smiles, exaggerated laughter, hand gestures becoming theatrical, faces becoming clear close-ups, lip sync issues, camera movement
audio_plan: ambient + subtle laugh (1x at 3s, royalty-free human voice library - NOT voice cloning) + cello sustained + soft piano
notes: v0.6: 5초 단일 클립 (트림 불필요). 2 real-person likeness checks. Laugh from royalty-free human voice library only.

prompt: Start from @이미지1. Hold framing completely static for the full 5 seconds. The distant silhouetted figure walks slowly toward the clubhouse entrance, with 3-4 step cycles visible. The figure becomes slightly smaller as it gets closer to the building. The warm window glows remain steady. The cool blue-grey sky deepens almost imperceptibly across the 5 seconds. Around 3.5s, the figure reaches the entrance area but does not enter — pauses very briefly at 4s. Subtle wind in distant trees. Sound: distant footsteps fade out as figure reaches entrance + evening ambient + BGM at full peak (piano + cello sustained at -12dB) sustained throughout, beginning to resolve toward end.
negative: figure becoming identifiable, camera movement, multiple people, modern car appearing, harsh artificial floodlights
